в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ -gn|--namespace <value> -gs|--shortname <value>                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                                                                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Help     в”Ӯ -tf|--template  Required String The template file to process      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ -gf|--output    Required String The name of the generated         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                                 file                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ -gn|--namespace Required String The namespace for the             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                                 generated code                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ -gs|--shortname Required String The short name (or id) of         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                                 the generator                     в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ -?|--help                       Displays this help.               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ                                                                   в”Ӯ
